_comment: Harvest Protocol — shared operating contract between KnownRecordRegistry (verifier) and EpochHarvester (scraper). Both services MUST read this file before any data collection. Changing values here changes behaviour system-wide.

separation_flags.0: RAW — immutable, sourced directly from VLR.gg HTML
separation_flags.1: RECONSTRUCTED — derived from raw via analytics pipeline

completeness_definition._comment: A match_id is COMPLETE when all conditions below are satisfied. Incomplete records are re-eligible for harvest.

skip_policy._comment: Controls when a known record is SKIPPED (not re-scraped). Both services enforce this policy identically.
skip_policy._rescrape_on_full_mode_note: Full-mode re-scrape still honours exclusion_list and checksum dedup

exclusion_reasons._comment: Canonical exclusion reasons. Any exclusion MUST use one of these codes.
exclusion_reasons.COMPLETE: Record is fully populated and verified — no action required
exclusion_reasons.MANUAL_EXCLUDE: Manually excluded by data team (e.g., exhibition match, corrupted source)
exclusion_reasons.DUPLICATE: Duplicate of another verified record (same match, different URL)
exclusion_reasons.SCHEMA_CONFLICT: HTML schema changed; record cannot be reliably parsed until parser is updated
exclusion_reasons.CONTENT_DRIFT: Same URL returned materially different HTML on re-check (>5% diff); flagged for review
exclusion_reasons.LOW_CONFIDENCE: Confidence tier below epoch floor after validation; excluded from analytics use
exclusion_reasons.RATE_LIMIT_BAN: Source IP/UA banned; match excluded until client rotation resolves it
exclusion_reasons.EXAMPLE_DATA: Synthetic example record used as agent security-check baseline. MUST NEVER enter the live analytics pipeline. separation_flag=9. Future agents must reproduce this record to verify pipeline correctness, then discard.

example_corpus._comment: Rules governing the committed example fixture set. These records exist solely as a reproducible correctness check for pipeline agents.
policy: Example records are EXCLUDED from all analytics aggregations (SimRating, RAR, investment grade).
Example records are EXCLUDED from KnownRecordRegistry live sets (complete/pending).
Example records ARE included in ExampleCorpus which is checked separately.
Future agents MUST reproduce the example scrape and compare against the fixture to verify pipeline correctness.
Reproduced records must match the fixture within ALLOWED_DRIFT tolerances (see below).
After security check passes, reproduced records must be discarded — do NOT store in live DB.
If the fixture needs updating, bump fixture_version and record the reason in the fixture file.

conflict_resolution._comment: Rules applied when registry and scraper detect conflicting state for the same match_id.

checksum_conflict._comment: Same match_id, different checksum on re-check

partial_write_detected._comment: File exists but integrity check fails (truncated write)

concurrent_scrape_conflict._comment: Two workers claim the same match_id simultaneously

epoch_boundary_conflict._comment: Match date falls within 24h of an epoch boundary

safety_thresholds._comment: Hard limits that MUST NOT be exceeded. Violation stops the pipeline.
safety_thresholds._max_content_drift_note: More than 5% HTML diff triggers CONTENT_DRIFT exclusion

registry_api._comment: Contract that KnownRecordRegistry exposes to EpochHarvester. Both must honour all methods.

methods.is_known: bool — True if match_id has any record (complete or not)
methods.is_complete: bool — True if match_id satisfies completeness_definition
methods.is_excluded: bool — True if match_id is on the exclusion list
methods.should_skip: bool — is_complete OR is_excluded; primary guard in harvester loop
methods.mark_complete: void — called by bridge after successful KCRITR record write
methods.mark_excluded: void(match_id, reason_code, notes) — adds to exclusion list
methods.list_pending: list[str] — match IDs known but not yet complete (delta mode targets)
methods.list_excluded: list[ExclusionEntry] — full exclusion list with reasons and timestamps
methods.get_stats: dict — counts of complete/pending/excluded per epoch

metrics_collected_per_match._comment: All metrics the pipeline collects and verifies. Downstream analytics jobs MUST declare which subset they consume.

scheduled_jobs._comment: Master schedule. All jobs consult this file to determine their operating parameters.

daily.description: Delta extraction (Epoch III only) + integrity + duplicate checks

weekly.description: SimRating/RAR/investment recalculation + regression tests + CSV snapshot

monthly.description: Full re-scrape all epochs + Liquipedia cross-ref + full validation suite
monthly._note: full mode still honours skip_if_excluded and checksum dedup
